tldr: Of 76 live ads, 41 are exact-copy clones of 'Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You' and 15 are clones of the Valentine's 'He♡rt Heist' — meaning ~74% of your active pool is two pieces of copy stretched across different product URLs. Expect CPM lift within 7-14 days as Meta's frequency caps collapse delivery onto the freshest 3-4 unique creatives.

benchmark.context: Fashion/jewelry DTC brands at top quartile rotate 8-12 distinct hooks per month. OHTNYC is running 5 unique copy templates across 76 placements, with 'THE USUAL' body copy duplicated 41 times and a Valentine's-themed angle still live on May 1 — well past seasonal relevance.

ads.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ THE USUAL ♡⊹˚₊ Not the jewelry you save for "someday." The ones you live in, grocery runs, late nights, everything between. Soft, sharp, and oht to the core ♡ Meet the usual, your everyday, upgraded ☁︎⚙︎☆
drivers: Identical body+headline duplicated across 41 of 76 ads (54% of pool)
Same copy pointed at 6+ different product URLs — Meta is auto-deduping delivery
Echo Cross necklace alone has 14+ identical clones competing in the same auctions

ads.headline: Steal Hearts This Valentine's ♡ He♡rt Heist
ads.body: Not just Valentine's jewelry — a He♡rt Heist. Crystal hearts, romantic motifs, and that signature Y2K sparkle you live for. Bold enough to steal the scene, sweet enough for butterflies ♡⊹˚₊ Your Valentine's era starts now ☆
drivers: Valentine's seasonal hook still live 75 days after Feb 14 — relevance score is bleeding
Duplicated 12 times, 8 of which point at the same nova-jewel-necklace URL
'Your Valentine's era starts now' reads stale in May; CTR will collapse fast

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: 8 identical clones of the LIGHTSUM collab copy, 5 pointed at cube-dice-necklace
'Limited drop' framing has been live too long to feel limited
No variant testing collab-credibility angle vs main-character-era angle

ads.headline: Level Up Your Fit with K-pop Style Jewelry
ads.body: Looking for Y2K jewelry that fits your vibe and your fit? We got you. 💿💅 The Y2K baddie aesthetic is officially back — and it's giving glow-up energy. ✨ Your era starts now. 💫
drivers: Same body recycled under 2 different headlines ('Level Up' and 'Wear it, love it')
'Y2K baddie aesthetic is officially back' phrasing is now 18+ months old in trend cycle
Routes to 4 unrelated SKUs (alchemists, silver-cross, snake-hoop, spike) — no SKU-message fit

ads.headline: Wear it, love it 🤍
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: 'Be unapologetically you' body copy reused 6 times across 3 different headlines
Generic empowerment angle — no product specificity, no NYC/streetwear DNA
5 of 6 copies funnel to the same silver-crystal-cross-necklace URL

ads_compact.headline: Layered to perfection
ads_compact.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.

ads_compact.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ads_compact.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.

ads_compact.headline: Steal Hearts with He♡rt Heist
ads_compact.body: This is what falling in love looks like. He♡rt Heist blends romance with edge: crystal-lit hearts, love-locked chains, surgical steel that shines. Built for stolen glances and Valentine's confidence ☁︎♡☁︎ The heist is on — catch feelings ✧˖°

ad_to_scale.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ad_to_scale.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
ad_to_scale.why: The LIGHTSUM collab is the only angle in your pool with built-in cultural authority — borrowed fandom equity is the cheapest CAC lever you have right now. Consolidate the 8 clones into 2 distinct creative variants (one fan-credibility, one supernova-product hero) and double the budget on the cube-dice-necklace landing. This is the only ad family that isn't competing against itself for an undifferentiated message.

ad_to_kill.headline: Steal Hearts This Valentine's ♡ He♡rt Heist
ad_to_kill.body: Not just Valentine's jewelry — a He♡rt Heist. Crystal hearts, romantic motifs, and that signature Y2K sparkle you live for. Bold enough to steal the scene, sweet enough for butterflies ♡⊹˚₊ Your Valentine's era starts now ☆
ad_to_kill.why: It's May. 'Your Valentine's era starts now' is actively hurting CTR and signaling to Meta that this account ships stale creative. Pause all 12 clones today — repurpose the He♡rt Heist product imagery into a non-seasonal 'edge meets romance' angle for Mother's Day prep and summer self-gifting.

concepts.hook: POV: she's stacking before the F train
concepts.angle: Real NYC creator films her morning jewelry stack on a moving subway/walking SoHo — places OHTNYC inside the lifestyle the brand claims, not in a studio.
concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ stacks that survive the commute ♡⊹˚₊ The Usual wasn't made for the jewelry box. It was made for the 6 train, the deli line, the after-hours. Three pieces, one stack, zero days off ☁︎⚙︎☆ Built in NYC, oht to the core. Tap to build yours ♡
concepts.visual_direction: Handheld POV of wrist + neckline stack, NYC sidewalk and subway b-roll, natural light, no studio polish. Text overlays call out each SKU at timestamps.
concepts.fills_gap: Zero of the 76 live ads are UGC or video — every placement is studio static. You're missing the streetwear/NYC identity the brand claims in its bio, and Meta favors video creative for cold prospecting CPMs.

concepts.hook: The heart motif means something. Here's what.
concepts.angle: Founder/designer story carousel — heart and supernova symbology, why each motif exists, swipe-to-product. Builds brand depth instead of hammering 'unapologetically you' empowerment generics.
concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ every piece has a backstory ♡⊹˚₊ The heart isn't a charm. The supernova isn't decoration. Built in NYC for the ones who wear meaning, not just metal ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Swipe through the symbols → find the one that's already yours.
concepts.visual_direction: Slide 1 hook text on black. Slides 2-5 each pair a motif (heart, supernova, cross, ribbon) with one sentence of meaning + product close-up. Slide 6: 'which one is you?' grid CTA.
concepts.fills_gap: The 'Be unapologetically you' body copy is duplicated 6+ times with zero substance — no story, no symbol, no NYC. This concept replaces the empty empowerment line with the brand's actual heart/supernova DNA referenced in your voice brief.

concepts.hook: 365 days. Shower. Gym. Ocean. Still shining.
concepts.angle: Surgical-steel durability proof — the only material claim in your current pool ('surgical steel that shines') is buried inside Valentine's copy. Pull it out as a standalone everyday-wear objection-killer.
concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ the daily test ♡⊹⚙︎ Showered in it. Slept in it. Forgot it in a gym bag for a week. Still shining ☁︎ Surgical steel + hypoallergenic finish = jewelry you actually live in, not the kind you pack away. Meet The Usual — oht to the core ✧˖°
concepts.visual_direction: Split-frame: left side shows piece on day 1 in studio, right side shows same piece after 365 days of real wear (water droplets, post-gym, beach). 9-second loop morphs between the two.
concepts.fills_gap: 76 ads, zero product proof or material claims surfaced as the lead message. 'Soft, sharp, and oht to the core' is poetic but unfalsifiable — this concept gives the buyer a reason-to-believe and unlocks repeat-purchase angles for warm audiences.

unlocks: Cut wasted spend on 41 cloned 'THE USUAL' placements competing in the same auctions
Recover relevance score by killing the May-stale Valentine's angle this week
Open 2 new creative formats (UGC video, carousel) currently absent from 100% of the pool
Stop routing 5 different SKUs to the same generic empowerment copy — match message to product

next_step.urgency: Top 3 ads hit fatigue between May 6 and May 9 — replacements need to ship this week.
next_step.headline: Lock in the May rotation before CPMs spike
next_step.body: 30 minutes to walk through which clones to pause first, the LIGHTSUM scale plan, and a shoot list for the 3 replacement concepts. You'll leave with a dated kill/scale schedule and a creative brief ready to hand to your editor.

method_note: Fatigue scoring weights duplicate copy frequency, landing-page overlap, seasonal staleness, and format monotony across all 76 live placements; days-until-fatigue is a directional forecast, not a guarantee.
